Module 6 - Lesson 3
Maximization Offer #2: The 	Soft Add-On

-- 1 of 3 --

Module 6 - Lesson 3
Elements Of The Soft Add-On Offer:!
•Congruent With Customer Captivation Offer!
•Adds Value To Customer Captivation Offer!
•Does NOT Imply Customer Captivation Is Incomplete!
•Pay Nothing Now Proposition (Build Trust)!
•Billed In 72 Hours (Only If Thrilled)!
•Priced Up To $67-$97!
•Presented As VSL (No ATC Delay) or Short-Form Sales
Letter
Maximization Offer #2: The Soft 	Add-On

-- 2 of 3 --

Module 6 - Lesson 3
Example:!
Maximization Offer #2: The Soft 	Add-On
